arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Victory will see the Cityzens earn a trip to the capital for the semi-finals of the world's oldest cup competition but they will face a sizeable test in the form of Bournemouth, who beat Pep Guardiola's side at the Vitality Stadium earlier this term. Manchester City can book their place at Wembley Stadium on Sunday when they visit Bournemouth in the FA Cup quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: The favourites to become next Brazil manager as Ancelotti and Guardiola linked
arts.sum: The search for the next Brazil manager is underway after Dorival Junior was sacked following their humiliating defeat at the hands of Argentina. The World Cup champions destroyed their arch rivals 4-1 in Buenos Aires on Wednesday to book their place at next summer’s tournament in North America, leaving the head coach’s position untenable. The […] The post The favourites to become next Brazil manager as Ancelotti and Guardiola linked first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: “They would love to bring him in”: Romano reveals Tottenham want to sign Man City target
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester City want to sign Tyler Dibling from Southampton at the end of the season. Southampton are set to go down to the Championship at the end of the season, and the 19-year-old attacker is likely to be on the move. He is one of the finest young talents in the Premier […] The post “They would love to bring him in”: Romano reveals Tottenham want to sign Man City target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Haaland investigated for consussing City mascot “Moonbeam”
arts.sum: According to media reports, Haaland allegedly struck the club mascot, Moonbeam, before the team’s 1-0 Premier League win against Southampton on 26 October . Erling Haaland is under investigation following an incident involving Manchester City’s mascot, Moonbeam .

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Barcelona beware as Pep Guardiola's side are plotting 'multi-million-dollar bid' for 'world's best midfielder'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly plotting a 'multi-million-dollar offer' for a Barcelona star labelled "the best midfielder in the world" by Hansi Flick.

arts.ttl: Why Bournemouth are Man City's kryptonite and how manager Andoni Iraola's style can beat Pep Guardiola AGAIN ahead of FA Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: The sands are shifting and it was Bournemouth's name that was at the front of Pep's mind when he admitted his grip on the game might be starting to loosen.

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash between Bournemouth and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make initial move for Bournemouth star – Talks held over €40m deal
arts.sum: Newcastle United have made an initial move for Bournemouth’s Dango Ouattara over a potential €40m move this summer. That’s according to Africa Foot, who report that Newcastle are ‘already making inroads’ ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Manchester United supporters group announce new protest against the Glazers following Man City derby
arts.sum: United fans protested against the Glazers on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Lazio likely to miss out on Manchester City starlet Claudio Echeverri
arts.sum: Lazio look unlikely to secure Argentine youngster Claudio Echeverri despite reports linking the Manchester City starlet to the Biancocelesti circulating over the past few days.
